title: Breaking silos with agentic AI: How Google Cloud transforms enterprise data into real-time action
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates FynanceAI, an agentic AI platform built on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP), that orchestrates enterprise data across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector stores while maintaining security and control. The demo shows how autonomous agents can execute critical business tasks across mission-critical systems of record beyond simple chatbot capabilities.
writeup: This video from Google Cloud Tech demonstrates FynanceAI, an agentic AI platform built on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) that orchestrates enterprise data across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector stores while preserving security and control. It matters because the demo pushes past chatbot use cases toward autonomous agents that execute business tasks against mission-critical systems of record. The key takeaway: ADK and MCP coordinate agents across siloed data sources so those agents can act, not just answer.
